productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Classic Brown Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish bag from lino perros. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Made of Leatherette for durability Has one zippered compartment with two inner zippers and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials Two short handles with snake skin design for carrying ease and style One zippered compartment at the back for additional space Snake skin panels on the base for enhanced style Metallic embelishment with brand name on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
